task_completion.description: Project is imported into Eclipse IDE
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eclipse IDE is open and the Project Explorer or Package Explorer view shows the 'clinical-trial-analytics' project with its three modules: 'trial-model', 'trial-engine', and 'trial-report'.

task_completion.description: The Java version in trial-report/pom.xml is updated to 17
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'trial-report/pom.xml' is open in the editor, and the properties for maven.compiler.source and maven.compiler.target are set to 17 (changed from 11).

task_completion.description: PatientFilter.java is fixed to use strictly greater than (>) instead of greater than or equal to (>=)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'PatientFilter.java' is open in the editor, and the lambda expression in the filter method (around line 24) shows 'p.getWeeksEnrolled() > config.getMinWeeks()' instead of '>='.

task_completion.description: StatisticalAnalyzer.java is fixed to use the population baseline instead of the group baseline
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'StatisticalAnalyzer.java' is open in the editor, and the baseline calculation (around line 30) calls 'baselineCalc.computePopulationBaseline(groups)' instead of 'computeGroupBaseline(groups.get(0))'.

task_completion.description: TrialSummary.java Builder is fixed to copy the sampleSize field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'TrialSummary.java' is open in the editor, and inside the Builder's 'build()' method (around lines 49-57), there is a line assigning 's.sampleSize = this.sampleSize;' which was previously missing.

task_completion.description: Maven clean test succeeds with all 15 tests passing
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Eclipse terminal/console view shows the output of 'mvn clean test' with 'BUILD SUCCESS' and 'Tests run: 15, Failures: 0, Errors: 0', OR the Eclipse JUnit view shows a green bar with 15/15 tests passed.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eclipse IDE as requested
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Eclipse IDE interface being used for code editing and debugging, rather than just a basic text editor like nano or vim in a terminal.

integrity.description: Test results are from genuine execution
integrity.visual_evidence: The test success output should appear in the standard Eclipse JUnit runner view or a genuine Maven console output window, not manually typed into a text file.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the test files to bypass failures
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be editing the source files (PatientFilter.java, StatisticalAnalyzer.java, TrialSummary.java, pom.xml). There should be no evidence of the agent deleting assertions or modifying files ending in 'Test.java' to force a pass.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project 'clinical-trial-analytics' has 3 modules and exactly 15 tests. To achieve BUILD SUCCESS, 4 specific fixes are required: 1) trial-report/pom.xml must have maven.compiler.source and target changed from 11 to 17. 2) PatientFilter.java line 24 must change '>=' to '>' to prevent NullPointerExceptions for incomplete patients. 3) StatisticalAnalyzer.java line 30 must change 'baselineCalc.computeGroupBaseline(groups.get(0))' to 'baselineCalc.computePopulationBaseline(groups)' to fix exploding normalized values. 4) TrialSummary.java's Builder.build() method must have 's.sampleSize = this.sampleSize;' added to properly copy the field. When all 4 are fixed, 'mvn clean test' will output BUILD SUCCESS with 15 tests run and 0 failures.
